# Isolated Iso Alley Godot Test

This folder contains the complete user-supplied `iso-alley-godot.zip` under
`source/godot-iso` and one path-adapted scene for the main Steamtek project:

- `IsoAlley_TestScene.tscn`
- `IsoAlley_Player.gd`

Open the adapted scene in the Steamtek Godot editor and press F6. Its background,
placeholder player, script, collision, and navigation resources all remain
inside this test namespace.

Nothing here is part of the Steamtek production modular library. Do not promote,
scan, or copy these files into `assets/modular_v2` or `scenes/modular_v2` without
a separate asset-intake decision.
